nodes.label:
TLS Handshake:
- Authenticate Server (Asym)
- Negotiate Session Key (Asym)

Data Transfer:
- Encrypt/Decrypt Data (Sym)
- Using Session Key

visuals.title: Encryption Types
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Symmetric vs Asymmetric Encryption Overview</text>
  
  <!-- Symmetric Encryption Section -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sender
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="60" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Receiver
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="200" y="130" width="40" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="20" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <path d="M120 100 L120 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <text x="70" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Symmetric Encryption
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Asymmetric Encryption Section -->
  <rect x="280" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sender
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="280" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Receiver
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="320" y="130" width="40" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="20" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Public
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="240" y="130" width="40" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="20" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Private
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <path d="M340 100 L340 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M280 155 L240 155" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <text x="340" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Asymmetric Encryption
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="30" y="280" width="360" height="50" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="5" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Legend
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="120" y="315" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Single Key = Symmetric
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="300" y="315" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Key Pair = Asymmetric
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
